lsp.justification: The answer matches the GT: it clearly states Redis core string/built-in types use switch/if dispatch on type/encoding with direct named calls, while RedisModuleTypeMethods/moduleType is the real function-pointer table used only for OBJ_MODULE. It also correctly contrasts this with wpa-style ops-table runtime indirection and cites the key object.c/redismodule.h/server.h/module.c evidence.
